items.name: utils
items.title: Utils
items.description: Class-name composer cn() built on clsx (no tailwind-merge; last-wins Tailwind contract).

items.name: use-platform
items.title: Use Platform
items.description: SSR-safe useIsMac() hook for OS-aware keyboard-shortcut glyph display.

items.name: list-surfaces
items.title: List Surfaces
items.description: Universal DataTable surface registry: ListSurface types plus register/get/list helpers with contract validation.

items.name: types
items.title: Shared Types
items.description: Cross-component types (DataTableDensity, RFC7807Problem) so type-only consumers don't vendor the data-table chain.

items.name: data-table
items.title: Data Table
items.description: Universal TanStack-based data table with density modes, multi-column sort, toolbar (search, filter chips, density toggle) and column visibility/reorder menu.

items.name: command-palette
items.title: Command Palette
items.description: Cmd/Ctrl+K combobox palette unifying action shortcuts, navigation entries, and async entity-ID jumps; shortcut map injected via props.

items.name: cheat-sheet
items.title: Keyboard Cheat Sheet
items.description: Modal listing every active keyboard shortcut, grouped by category; shortcut map and category order injected via props.

items.name: detail-layout
items.title: Detail Layout
items.description: Universal entity detail-page primitive: back link, eyebrow + h1, tab nav, optional metric row, content with optional right rail.

items.name: filter-popover
items.title: Filter Popover
items.description: Typed filter model + chip rendering conventions shared across list views.

items.name: confirm-action
items.title: Confirm Action
items.description: Destructive-action confirmation with consistent UX, compensation messaging, and focus return.

items.name: async-operation-status
items.title: Async Operation Status
items.description: Long-running operation status pattern (pending / progress / done / failed).

items.name: markdown
items.title: Markdown
items.description: Sanitized markdown rendering with token-mapped typography and code-block styling.

items.name: relative-time
items.title: Relative Time
items.description: Hydration-safe relative timestamps with tabular-nums and hover-for-absolute.

items.name: states
items.title: States
items.description: Standardized empty / loading / error state triplet with retry affordances.

items.name: user-chip
items.title: User Chip
items.description: User chip + avatar with fallback, presence, and overflow truncation conventions.

items.name: form
items.title: Form
items.description: react-hook-form + zod form primitive rendering from declarative field definitions.
